---
title: Templates overview
description: Dovetell templates are reusable Markdown assets packaged from reviewed source material.
---

Dovetell templates are reusable Markdown assets packaged from reviewed source
material.

They may include:

- context folder templates
- session launchers
- prompt shapers
- decision and task schemas
- audit prompts
- review checklists
- setup guides

Start with [free samples](/templates/free-samples) if you want to try the
workflow before buying or adopting a larger package.
